intent: Navigate to BoatTrader search page at https://www.boattrader.com/boats/
Click Private Seller option in seller type filter on the left sidebar
Enter zip code 33101 in the location or zip code search input field
Set radius to 25 miles in the distance dropdown filter
Set minimum price to 35000 in the min price input field
Verify page shows filtered results: Private Seller is selected, location shows Miami or 33101, and results count is visible
